expected: POST /api/v1/auth/register accepts name/login/password and creates a user session.
root_cause: Auth routes only supported login/logout/me flows.

description: Admin identity could drift from required fixed credential model.
expected: Fixed admin/admin in all environments with immutable admin identity.
root_cause: Admin seed could be environment-driven and editable.

description: Read/unread semantics were coupled with response status.
expected: Read state based on read_at only; response status tracked independently.
root_cause: Historical business logic mixed acknowledgement and response dimensions.

description: Missing bulk read operation for user notifications.
expected: POST /api/v1/me/notifications/read-all marks only logged user unread records as read.
root_cause: API exposed only per-item read mutation.

description: Dedicated user/admin login routes and register toggle were absent.
expected: Support /login and /admin/login with role-aware access flow.

description: Bell dropdown/page flow did not fully match classic requirement.
expected: Dropdown shows latest 10 overall with unread badge, CTA to full page, mark-all action on full page.

description: Pending recipients list still filtered by response status instead of read state.
root_cause: Legacy coupling retained in UI view logic.
